definition: Primary key for the dish record. Unique identifier used across the system.
notes: Can be null for ingest; assigned by DB.

definition: Primary user-facing dish name in the app’s primary language.
Local/native-language dish name (if applicable).
URL-safe canonical slug used for routes and deduping.
Primary cuisine classification used for filtering/browse.
Menu course classification (course axis).
Dish format/type classification (orthogonal to course_type).
Dayparts when the dish is commonly consumed.
Short UI description shown in previews/cards.
example_value: Silky pasta in a creamy egg-and-cheese sauce with crisp pancetta.
